app_info.subtitle: Manage Argo campaigns
app_info.description: Argo helps players and game masters manage campaign data, lore entries, sessions, guild membership, friend requests, invites, and community forum activity from ChatGPT using the user's OAuth-authorized Argo account.

justifications.read_only_justification: Accepts a pending friend request and updates friendship state in Argo.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes private Argo state and does not publish to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates or updates records but does not delete data, revoke access, or perform an irreversible admin action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Links a campaign to a guild in Argo, changing guild state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes private Argo state and does not publish to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates or updates records but does not delete data, revoke access, or perform an irreversible admin action.

test_cases.description: List campaigns before choosing one to inspect.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the Argo campaigns I can access and which ones are read-only versus read-write.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the campaigns available through the current OAuth grant with enough detail to choose one for follow-up actions.

test_cases.description: Inspect full campaign details for a selected campaign.
test_cases.user_prompt: Open my Black Harbor campaign and show me its description, rules system, and co-GMs.
test_cases.expected_output: Finds the requested campaign and returns its campaign metadata and assistant GM details.

test_cases.description: Search campaign lore before editing it.
test_cases.user_prompt: Find all NPC mnemons in my Black Harbor campaign with Raven in the title.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching mnemon entries so the user can choose the right record to inspect or edit.

test_cases.description: Explain supported mnemon types before creating entries.
test_cases.user_prompt: What mnemon types can I create in Argo, and which one should I use for a session recap versus a place entry?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the supported mnemon types and edit rules so the user can choose the correct entry type before creating content.

test_cases.user_prompt: In my Black Harbor campaign, append a new paragraph to the Captain Nyra mnemon saying she now trusts the party after the bridge ambush.
test_cases.expected_output: Finds the requested mnemon, reads its current blocks, and appends the new paragraph to the stored entry.

test_cases.user_prompt: Schedule a Black Harbor session for June 21, 2026 at 7 PM called Siege of the North Gate.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a new session for the selected campaign and confirms the scheduled title and start time.

test_cases.user_prompt: Invite user 4f1c2f7a to my Ravenwatch guild and add a guild calendar event for Session Zero next Friday at 18:00.
test_cases.expected_output: Identifies the selected guild, creates the invitation, and adds the requested guild calendar event.

test_cases.description: Review guild members before changing a role.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show the members of my Ravenwatch guild and promote Mira to Admin if she is still a regular member.
test_cases.expected_output: Finds the selected guild, lists the current members, and updates the chosen member's role if the requested change is allowed.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show me my pending received friend requests and accept the one from Rowan if it's still open.
test_cases.expected_output: Lists pending inbound requests and accepts the matching request when it is present.

test_cases.description: Send an outbound Argo email invite.
test_cases.user_prompt: Invite alex@example.com and sam@example.com to join Argo.
test_cases.expected_output: Sends invitation emails and reports per-address invite results.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the latest Argo forum topics and any forum notifications I need to catch up on.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns recent community activity plus the current user's notifications without creating any new forum content.

test_cases.description: Search the community forum before posting.
test_cases.user_prompt: Search the Argo forum for posts about guild calendars, and if there is nothing similar, create a feature request asking for recurring guild events.
test_cases.expected_output: Searches existing forum content first, then creates a new topic in an appropriate category only if needed.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated general knowledge questions.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is unrelated to Argo account, campaign, guild, invite, or forum workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for work outside Argo systems.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Send an email from my Gmail account to my boss.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is for a different external service and not Argo invitations.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for device or local file tasks.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Rename the PDF on my desktop to session-notes.pdf.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is a local filesystem action outside the app's supported workflows.
